title: More banner layers
description: A simple mod that adds more layers to the banners in Minecraft.
body:
## More banner layers
The name already explains the purpose of the mod. The mod will add a config file named __morebannerlayers_config.properties__ in the config folder, which will allow you to specify the number of layers you will be able to have on the banners. Minecraft's default is 6 layers. This mod will set the default to 12 layers.
